headline: GoDaddy, Bandwidth, and GitLab Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after a confluence of high-profile AI talent departures from Alphabet, and a regulatory overhang pulled the entire communication-services and software complex lower.
